titleStmt.title: SII 34.129: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 129. Tiruveṟumbūr, Tiruchirappalli Taluk, Tiruchirappalli District. On the south wall of the central shrine in the Piplikēśvara temple.

summary.p: Vēḷān Vīranāraṇaṉ alias Sembiyaṉ Vēdivēḷāṉ assigned some land after purchase from the local sabhā for singing the tiruppadiyam in the temple, accompanied by the musical instruments uḍukkai and tāḷam. This land was added to the land that the donor purchased sometime back (mentioned in No. 123 above). Among the boundaries is mentioned a canal called Kiḷiyūr-vāykkāl that was dug by the donor with the permission of the king (line 8).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kOvirājakEcari paṉmarkku yāṇṭu mūṉṟāvatu teṉ
karai brahmatēyam śrīkaṇṭa ścaturvveti maṅkalattup peruṅkuṟi sabhaiyōm
tiruveṟumpiyūrāḻvāṟkku śrīvimāṉameṭuppitta ciṟutavūruṭaiyāṉ vēḷāṉ vīranāraya
ṇaṉāṉa cempiyaṉ veytivēḷār tiruveṟumpiyūrāḻvāṟkut tiruppatiyam
pāṭuvāṟku nivan=tamāka Ivaṟku viṟṟukkuṭutta nilamāvatu Eṅkaḷūriṉṟeṉ pāṭē
yeṅkaḷ potu nilattukku kīḻpāṟkellai tiruveṟumpiyūrāḷvār nilam
nākarkālukku mēṟkum teṉpāṟkellai nākarkālukku vaṭakku mīpāṟkellai Iccem
piyaṉ veytivēḷār śrīmukaṅkuṇantu kalliviṭṭa kiḷiyūr vāykkālukku kiḻakkum vaṭa
pāṟkellai Ivvūr valavūr māppāni kārinakka ṉilattukkum It tiruveṟumpiyūrāḷvār nila
ttukkut tekkum Ivvicaitta perunāṉkallai yuḷakappaṭṭa ṉilam Attuṇaiyilum
Ittiruveṟumpiyūrāḷvāṟkku Ivvūrt tirukkūr maṟṟakkāviṭṭa ṉāraṇaṉ puruṣō
ttama nīrōṭaṭṭikkuṭutta nilamum muṉ Ittiruveṟumpiyūrāḷvār nilamāna nilamu
m nīykki niṉṟa nilam sabhaiyōm sabhaip potuvāy kiṭanta nilam Attuṇaiyu
muṇṇila moḻiviṉṟi cempiyaṉ vētivēḷāṟku viṟṟukkuṭuttu nāṅkaḷ viṟṟukkuṭu
tta Iṉnilattukku muṉ tēvar kuṭivacam peṟṟa Iṉ nilattukkum muṉ Ittēvar nilattuk
ku cantrātittavalam Iṟaikāvalākavum nāṅkaḷ viṟṟa nilattukku kreya dravyamum Āka
mmilicainta viṟaikāvaṟpoṉṉum kreyamum dravyamum vilaiyāvaṇakkaḷiyē kaic
cela Aṟakkoṇṭu Iṉnilattiṉ mēl sabhaiyōm vaiyppināl valavūr māppānikā
ri nakkanilat ṉai Iccempiyaṉ vētivēḷārē kuṭuttuc coṉ
ṟukoḷḷakkaṭavarāka Ipparicoṭṭic cantirātittavalam Iṟaikāvalāka vilaikkaṟa viṟṟu
pporuḷaṟakkoṇṭu viṟṟu vilaiyāvaṇañ ceytu kuṭuttōm vēḷāṉ vīranāraṇaṉā
ṉa cempiyaṉ veytivēḷāṉukku śrīkaṇṭaccaturvvetimaṅkalattupperuṅkuṟi sa sabhai
yōm peruṅkuṟi sabhaiyār paṇittaruḷa paṇiyāl Ivvilaiyu miṟaikāvalu meḻutiṉēṉ
Ivvūr madhyastaṉ dharmmapriyaṉāṉa kalivicaiyaṉ taruṇēntu cēkaraṉēṉ Ivaiye
ṉṉeḻuttu Iṉṉilamum śrīkaṇṭa ccaturvetimaṅkalattārun tiruveṟumpi
yūrārun taṅkaḷil sīmāvivātamāyk kiṭanta nilam Ivviraṇṭu tiṟattāriṭai
yum nāṉ vilaikkukkoṇṭa nilamuṅkoṇṭu Ivvāḻvārai nāṉ pāṭit tiruppa
tiyam mūṉṟu santiyu muḍhukkaiyun tāḷamuṅ koṇṭu nālvar Aṭikaḷmār tiruppa
tiyam pāṭuvatāka candrādittaval cētukuṭu[t*tēṉ] cempiyaṉ vētivēḷānēṉ Itu
paṉmāheśvara rakṣai ..
Digital edition of SII 34.129 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
